text:
Market today: Risk-off mood. Grantham calling this the most expensive market in US history, inflation above 4% with Fed pressure easing, and oil sliding below $70 — that combo is spooking growth/tech names exactly like yours. Margin environment is punishing right now.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest concern — down 15.6%, largest position, on SELL signal. That loss is amplified on margin. PLTR is also flagged SELL at -13.88%, meaningful dollar pain if you're sized up. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no trading history — treat it like a live grenade; margin makes it worse. SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF down 17.3% and decays daily — every sideways day costs you.

Watch: (1) Whether AVGO holds above its $336 stop — a break there forces a decision fast. (2) Chip tape broadly — Micron is sinking, which poisons sentiment for AVGO and SMH.

Bottom line: Your two biggest fires are AVGO and PLTR — on margin, letting losers run is how accounts blow up.
